module.name: HTML
module.param:
Explore new reports

Click an area of interest below to see some examples of what you can do.

module.name: Search
module.param: | inputlookup examples | appendcols [| inputlookup cidr | search NOT site_name="Example Site" | stats count as sites_lookup_count] | appendcols [| inputlookup devices | search NOT name="PLACEHOLDER*" | stats count as devices_lookup_count] | appendcols [| inputlookup groups | search NOT group="PLACEHOLDER*" | stats count as groups_lookup_count] | filldown groups_lookup_count sites_lookup_count devices_lookup_count

module.name: PostProcess
module.param: | eval category=split(category,",") | stats count by category

module.name: PostProcess
module.param: search category= "$category$" | eval type=case(match(uri,"mode=chart"),"chart",match(uri,"/calls"),"table of calls",match(uri,"/app/cisco_cdr/search"),"raw splunk search",match(uri,"/gateway_utilization($$|\?)"),"concurrency report",match(uri,"/groups$$($$|\?)"),"investigate groups",match(uri,"/extensions($$|\?)"),"investigate extensions",match(uri,"/sites$$"),"investigate sites",match(uri,"/devices$$($$|\?)"),"investigate devices",match(uri,"/gateways$$($$|\?)"),"investigate gateways",true(),"unknown") | eval sites_ok = if(requires=="sites" AND sites_lookup_count==0,0,1) | eval groups_ok = if(requires=="groups" AND groups_lookup_count==0,0,1) | eval devices_ok = if(requires=="devices" AND devices_lookup_count==0,0,1) | eval disabledClassName = if(sites_ok==0 OR groups_ok==0 OR devices_ok==0,"disabled","") | eval requires_str = if(sites_ok==0 OR groups_ok==0 OR devices_ok==0,"(" + requires + " lookup is not configured. See Setup > Define " + requires + ")","")
